creator: mail@skillcoder.com
text:

And now 
sudo pfctl -ss | awk '{print $6}' | sort | uniq -c | sort -nr | head
 162 ESTABLISHED:ESTABLISHED
  40 FIN_WAIT_2:ESTABLISHED
  10 FIN_WAIT_2:FIN_WAIT_2
   9 TIME_WAIT:TIME_WAIT
   1 ESTABLISHED:FIN_WAIT_2
